title: fumaria bulbosa subsp. intermedia
intro: Fumaria bulbosa subsp. intermedia, also known as Intermediate Fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions like arthritis and gastrointestinal issues. Fumaria bulbosa subsp. intermedia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits.
